title: Opening for Software Engineer at Narayana Health Digital

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Narayana Health Digital
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
